conditions.llm_instruction: Check if the trial is studying pancreatic cancer. Return 'Yes' if it is, otherwise return 'No'. Do not explain your answer.
Determine if the trial investigates targeted therapies or immunotherapies. Return 'Yes' if it does, otherwise return 'No'. Do not explain your answer.

Check if the trial reports survival outcomes such as progression-free survival (PFS) or overall survival (OS). Return 'Yes' if such outcomes are reported, otherwise return 'No'. Do not explain your answer.

Identify if the trial enrolls biomarker-stratified populations such as HER2-positive, MSI-H, or PD-L1 positive. Return 'Yes' if any of these biomarkers are mentioned, otherwise return 'No'. Do not explain your answer.
Determine if the trial is in Phase III. Return 'Yes' if it is Phase III, otherwise return 'No'. Do not explain your answer.
Extract the number of enrolled patients. Return a number only. Do not include units or explanations.
Extract and return the names of drugs or interventions under investigation as a Python list or a single comma-separated string. Do not perform any FDA approval checks.
